concerns.detail: Unsupported rumor about professor's personal conduct (affair) presented as character judgment rather than advising practice critique
concerns.excerpt: UCSB Lingqi yan 坊间传说和女博后出轨，老婆闹到学校

concerns.detail: Replacement of specific criticism with watered-down versions that contradict original claims (e.g., adding 'never scolded anyone' after 'bad temper', 'true but changed' after 'many quit'), suppressing substantive observations
concerns.excerpt: 长期PUA组内学生，实习期间高强度打工；Depends on projects...多人quit；true, but changed

concerns.detail: Unsupported personal attack on identified student (influencer) attacking character and academic ability
concerns.excerpt: 组里有著名xhs学术女网红(Blue whale?)，tpami是被送的，学术能力为0，人是最mean的
